codeReview.summary: The prior VAL-CROSS-004 blockers are cleared on current HEAD. Commits `b869e0f`, `ba4a01f`, and `f93edbb` add a dedicated feature-owned proof bundle (`.factory/validation/mission-verification/mission-cross-flow-daemon-failure-continuation-proof.json`), a feature-owned Electron flow artifact (`.factory/validation/mission-verification/user-testing/flows/daemon-failure-continuation-proof.json`), and deterministic same-session automation in `test/missionDaemonFailureHarness.test.ts`. The proof no longer closes via the superseded shared follow-up bundle or injected paused-state evidence alone: the screenshot chain keeps one Mission-GUI-TEST session selected from retry exhaustion through normal-chat continuation, and the harness proves the same Mission session accepts the follow-up chat message with no extra permission request and zero continuation `droid.load_session` calls.

summary: Scrutiny passed. Current HEAD now contains a feature-owned VAL-CROSS-004 deliverable backed by a clean same-session Mission-GUI-TEST Electron screenshot chain and deterministic harness coverage for daemon/factoryd failure -> bounded retry -> orchestrator-turn recovery -> continue via normal chat on the same Mission session.
